summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FAOD-SECOURS73 platform new features. Backend APIs working excellently (100% success rate), frontend UI functioning well with minor navigation issue. All key features implemented and working: PSC content enrichment (8 chapters, 32 fiches), certificate system, test accounts, logo integration, and formateur certificate configuration.

passed_tests: Landing page logo display (navbar, hero, footer)
PSC chapters API - 8 chapters with 32 fiches total
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI navigation improvement needed: Make the groupe settings page more easily accessible from the formateur group detail page. Consider adding a more prominent 'Settings' or 'Paramètres' button. All core functionality is working correctly.
